title: 7506 - Head of BIM [ Building Construction ]
description:
• HQ at Changi Business Park [ Expo MRT ]
  • Mon to Fri, from 8.30am to 5.15pm
  • Salary is $6,000 - $8,000 + Variable Bonus [ No AWS ]

A BIM manager's role is to implement a company's Building Information Modeling (BIM) process and manage the process throughout the design, construction, and all stages of a building project.

A BIM manager's responsibilities include:

  • Enforcing standards: Ensuring that BIM standards are met and that the model complies with project specifications and legal requirements
  • Managing software: Managing the software used for BIM
  • Quality control: Conducting regular quality checks to ensure the model meets quality standards
  • Delivering technology strategy: Delivering a business's technology strategy and promoting the benefits of digital ways of working
  • Supporting a team: Ensuring that projects run smoothly and project information models are delivered on time

Job Scope:

  • Involve and lead in checking and coordination of Shop drawings and as-built drawings with all respective trades (e.g., Architectural, Structural, MEP and Specialist Subcontractors works)
  • Review project specifications, Shop drawings and technical clarifications
  • Able to prepare and monitor the progress of Shop drawings and Sample schedule with procurement schedule
  • Manage submission and approvals of Shop drawings and Samples from Consultants
  • Manage receipt and issuance of all Consultant drawings and Shop drawings
  • Liaise and coordinate with Consultants, Authorities and Subcontractors on design issues
  • Assist the Project team on technical and coordination issues with Subcontractors
  • Attend and chair design technical meetings with Consultants and Subcontractors
  • Assist the Project contracts department in variation order claims related to design changes

Requirements:

  • Recognized Degree in Architecture/ Engineering/ Construction or equivalent
  • Min 10 years of experience in drawing coordination and management in the Singapore Construction Industry
  • Well versed in Autocad, Revit/BIM software in Architectural/ Structural/ MEP. Candidates with experience in BIM projects are at an added advantage
  • Good understanding of the Singapore Construction Industry regulations (eg. Building code, BCA, URA and LTA)
  • Knowledge in Specialist trade works eg Curtainwall, Stone and Interior design works
